title: Future MC
body:
Interested in Future MC? [Join my discord server](https://discord.gg/xtFWtm4).

 

Like my projects? Consider donating: https://www.patreon.com/bePatron?u=35155287

 

Adds blocks from future versions, so far I have added a few blocks and items. This mod is very early in development and will continue to update as I work on it.

 

Adds (1.12 version):

Bell - A block (from 1.14) that rings and hangs on walls ceilings, or sits on the ground.

Lantern - A light source (from 1.14) which can be set on the ground or hung from a ceiling.

Chain - A decorative block (from 1.16) that be used to hang lanterns.

Stonecutter - A block (from 1.14) that converts stone blocks into other variants. (CraftTweaker & JEI compatibility)

Grindstone - A block from 1.14 that repairs and disenchants items.

Smoker and Blast Furnace - Blocks (from 1.14) that can only smelt specific items, but use fuel much more efficiently and smelt twice as fast as a normal furnace. (CraftTweaker & JEI compatibility)

1.14 Flowers - (Lily of the Valley, Wither Rose and Cornflower) Flowers that each craft into their respective dyes (White, Black, Blue).

1.14 Walls - 12 new wall variants (from 1.14) that inherit their looks from different blocks.

1.14 Dyes - These dyes can be used to craft items that require a dye of that color.

1.13 Fish - Cod, Salmon, Pufferfish, and Tropical fish (from 1.13) that spawn in bodies of water.

1.13 Stripped logs, wood, and stripped wood - Strippable with an axe

Trident - A throw-able weapon from 1.13. Also has Loyalty, Channeling, and Impaling enchantments. For now, they are obtained by killing Elder Guardians. No 3D item model yet.

Barrel - A block (from 1.14) that can store items like a chest even in tight places.

Suspicious Stew - An item (from 1.14) that grants a potion effect when consumed. Craftable like Mushroom Stew but with any Vanilla flower. Has support for modded effects.

Loom - A block (from 1.14) that can be used to customize banners.

Berry Bush - A block (from 1.14) that can be harvested to collect Sweet Berries. Found naturally in Taiga biomes, and has 4 stages of growth just like in 1.14.

Campfire - A crackling light source (from 1.14) that can cook up to 4 food items at once and puffs signal smoke. (CraftTweaker & JEI compatibility)

Stripped Logs - A variant of the vanilla log that does not have its bark.

Composter - A block (from 1.14) that composts items into bonemeal. (CraftTweaker compatibility)

Bamboo - A plant (from 1.14) that grows tall and thick. Can be used as furnace fuel and to craft sticks.

Panda - An animal (from 1.14) that spawns in jungles. Its favorite food is Bamboo.

Bee - A flying insect (from 1.15) that can be found in bee nests that generate on trees and when a tree is grown near flowers. (CraftTweaker compatibility)

Honey blocks and honeycomb blocks - Honey (from 1.15) can be used as an alternative to slime that doesn't stick to slime.

Honey Bottle (from 1.15) - A special food item that cures poison potion effects upon consumption.

Bee nests and beehives - The homes of bees (from 1.15). Can be harvested by bottles and shears, even by a dispenser!

Pigstep - The music disc from 1.16. Enjoy!

1.14 Trapdoors - The new wooden trapdoors for each wood variant.

 

Adds (1.15 version):

Smithing Table Functionality - Crafts netherite tools and armor and has CraftTweaker support.

Netherite Toolset & Armor - Netherite tools and armor from 1.16 that do not burn in lava.

Ancient Debris - Ore that generates in the nether and does not burn in lava.

 

***

1.12 versions require Latest Forge (2847 or newer) and Shadowfacts' Forgelin.

1.15 versions require Kotlin For Forge.

 

Every feature in the mod is toggle-able by a config file.

More features will be added!
